customer.businessProblem: AML review teams are overwhelmed by manual case review. Analysts spend 70% of their time on low-risk cases that could be auto-triaged, leaving insufficient capacity for complex escalations. Inconsistent escalation quality is creating compliance risk.
customer.desiredOutcome: Reduce average AML case review time by 40%, improve escalation consistency, maintain full human approval on all cases, and produce audit-ready documentation automatically.

discovery.currentProcess: Analysts manually review all flagged transaction alerts in the case management system. Each case requires pulling customer profile data, reviewing transaction history, checking against sanctions lists, and writing a narrative summary. Cases are escalated to senior analysts or SAR teams based on individual judgement.
discovery.usersAffected: 18 AML analysts, 4 senior AML officers, 2 compliance managers, 1 MLRO
discovery.constraints: Regulated environment — all model outputs require human sign-off. Full audit trail required for every decision. Data cannot leave the EU. Model must be explainable to regulators. Security review required before any system integration.
discovery.knownRisks: Model false negatives creating compliance exposure. Regulator scrutiny of AI in financial crime. Analyst trust and adoption. Explainability of AI recommendations. Data quality in legacy case management system.
discovery.successDefinition: 40% reduction in average case review time. Escalation consistency score above 85%. Zero cases processed without human approval. Audit documentation completeness above 95%.
discovery.buyerTeam: Chief Compliance Officer, Head of Financial Crime, IT Director

stakeholders.name: Ade Mensah
requiredActions: Provide API access to case management system

workflows.name: Alert Intake
workflows.description: Transaction monitoring system generates alerts. Alerts are assigned to analysts in the case management system.

workflows.name: Case Prioritisation
workflows.description: Analyst reviews alert and assigns initial risk priority before starting investigation.

workflows.name: Customer and Transaction Review
workflows.description: Analyst pulls customer profile, reviews transaction history, and checks sanctions/PEP lists.

workflows.name: Narrative and Decision
workflows.description: Analyst writes case narrative, records decision rationale, and either closes or escalates the case.

workflows.name: Escalation and SAR Filing
workflows.description: Senior analyst reviews escalated cases and determines if a SAR should be filed.

systems.name: Actimize Case Manager
systems.notes: Core system. REST API available but documentation is incomplete. Rate limits apply. Security review required.

systems.name: Transaction Monitoring Platform
systems.notes: No API available. Data exported as CSV daily. Batch processing only. API roadmap is 18 months out.

systems.name: Customer Profile Database
systems.notes: Legacy Oracle DB. Read-only access may be available. IT to confirm. GDPR constraints on data access.

systems.name: World-Check (Sanctions / PEP)
systems.notes: Refinitiv World-Check API. Licence already held. Integration is standard.

systems.name: Compliance Policy Document Store
systems.notes: SharePoint-based. No API. Policy PDFs will need to be ingested manually. Versioning is a concern.

dataSources.name: Transaction Alerts Export
openQuestions: What is the format for flagged fields?

dataSources.name: Customer Profile Records
openQuestions: GDPR lawful basis for AI processing?

risks.title: Model false negatives — missed financial crime
risks.description: AI triage may miss genuine AML cases, creating regulatory and reputational exposure.
risks.mitigation: Define and enforce minimum recall threshold (>99%). All AI recommendations require human sign-off. Weekly model performance review during pilot.
risks.escalationTrigger: Any false negative identified during pilot

risks.title: Model explainability — regulator challenge
risks.description: FCA or internal audit may challenge the basis for AI-assisted triage decisions.
risks.mitigation: Require structured rationale output per recommendation. Maintain audit trail of AI inputs, outputs, and analyst overrides. Pre-brief FCA relationship manager.
risks.escalationTrigger: Any regulator enquiry or internal audit request related to AI decisions

risks.title: Transaction monitoring system has no API
risks.description: Alert data is CSV batch only. Real-time integration is not possible without 18-month IT roadmap change.
risks.mitigation: Design MVP around daily batch processing. Parallel-track API access request with IT leadership.
risks.escalationTrigger: Batch processing causes >2 hour delay in case pickup

risks.title: Customer profile data quality is poor
risks.description: Legacy Oracle DB has incomplete and inconsistent customer records. AI enrichment quality depends on input data quality.
risks.mitigation: Data quality audit before pilot launch. Define minimum data completeness threshold. Flag low-quality profiles for manual review.
risks.escalationTrigger: Data completeness below 70% on pilot population

risks.title: Security review delays
risks.description: IT security review is required before any integration. Timeline is unknown and could delay pilot.
risks.mitigation: Submit security review documentation immediately. Prepare data processing agreement and architecture overview. Escalate to IT Director if review stalls.
risks.escalationTrigger: Security review not started within 2 weeks of project kickoff

risks.title: Analyst adoption — trust in AI recommendations
risks.description: Analysts may ignore or over-rely on AI recommendations, undermining the intended workflow change.
risks.mitigation: Co-design recommendation UX with lead analyst. Include training on AI limitations. Track override rate during pilot — target 15-30%.
risks.escalationTrigger: Override rate above 60% or below 5% during pilot

risks.title: GDPR lawful basis for AI processing of customer data
risks.description: Processing PII for AI model inference requires confirmed lawful basis under GDPR Article 6.
risks.mitigation: Legal review of DPIA. Confirm legitimate interest basis. Ensure data minimisation in model inputs.
risks.escalationTrigger: Legal review not complete before any customer data is processed by the model

risks.title: Audit trail gaps in current system
risks.description: Actimize Case Manager does not automatically log all AI inputs and outputs needed for audit trail.
risks.mitigation: Design immutable audit log as part of integration. Log: AI input, AI output, analyst decision, and override reason.
risks.escalationTrigger: Any audit log gap identified in testing

pilotPlan.objective: Validate that AI-assisted AML case triage reduces review time by 40% and improves escalation consistency without reducing detection quality.
pilotPlan.scope: Alert intake and case prioritisation steps only. Customer and transaction review remains fully manual. All cases require human sign-off.

successMetrics.name: Average case review time
successMetrics.measurementMethod: Time logged in Actimize Case Manager from case open to decision

successMetrics.name: Escalation consistency score
successMetrics.baseline: 62% agreement between analysts on same cases (blind test)
successMetrics.measurementMethod: Monthly blind calibration exercise — 20 cases reviewed independently by 4 analysts

successMetrics.name: Human approval rate
successMetrics.measurementMethod: Case audit — zero cases without analyst sign-off

successMetrics.name: Analyst override rate
successMetrics.measurementMethod: AI recommendation vs analyst decision logged per case

launchCriteria: GDPR DPIA signed off by legal
Actimize Case Manager API integration tested
rollbackCriteria: Any false negative identified (missed genuine AML case)
Analyst override rate above 60% for 3 consecutive days
System downtime above 4 hours in any 24-hour period
pilotPlan.baselineMeasurement: 4-week pre-pilot baseline captured from existing Actimize logs. Analyst calibration exercise completed.
pilotPlan.targetOutcome: 40% reduction in case review time. 85% escalation consistency. 100% human approval maintained. Zero audit trail gaps.
